visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white top stands in a Costco aisle. She holds a large red bag of PopCorners while smiling. Behind her are stacked boxes and shelves typical of a wholesale warehouse. (2) She gestures towards a stack of green boxes featuring the character Rex from Toy Story. The camera focuses on the green box as she points to a transparent window showing smaller snack bags inside. She picks up one box and rotates it to show the different sides, including a large illustration of Rex and the product information on the back. (3) The woman holds the box next to her face, smiling broadly and pointing at the price/quantity text overlay. She appears to be addressing the camera directly with an enthusiastic expression as she encourages engagement from viewers.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 爆米花小包 抱抱龍派對箱. [Subtitle]: 如果這個你超愛的話. (2) [Subtitle]: 那你不能錯過它現在的小包裝. [Variety]: 小包裝. (3) [Subtitle]: 大包吃不完 我們來看一下 派對組合. (4) [Subtitle]: 是抱抱龍的 而且它這邊還有一個透明的. (5) [Subtitle]: 所以你以後放東西還可以若隱若現你的食物. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後它裡面的口味是海鹽以及甜辣. (7) [Subtitle]: 它真的口感就是有點鬆鬆的. (8) [Subtitle]: 最重要箱子真的很可愛 看正面 側面. (9) [Subtitle]: 後面是成分表 299元有7包. (10) [Subtitle]: 所以這樣一小包是30塊 你覺得值得嗎 留言告訴我們.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair, wearing a white off-the-shoulder top and a black and white patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving, stacked boxes of snacks, and bright industrial lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins speaking in Mandarin over a bright, rhythmic electronic pop track. The speech rate is fast and energetic, typical of social media product reviews. Faint rustling of plastic is audible as she handles a snack bag. (2) The voice continues without significant pauses, describing the product's packaging and taste. The background music maintains a steady 124 BPM beat with electronic synth textures. The recording has clear vocal presence with a high signal-to-noise ratio. (3) The speaker concludes with an interrogative tone, asking the audience's opinion. The music continues until the end, providing a consistent energetic atmosphere. The audio exhibits a compressed dynamic range suitable for mobile broadcast.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Showcase -> Pricing -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific PopCorners variety box found at Costco, emphasizing the cute 'Rex' character branding and the value of individual snack packs.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcasing of a specific brand and product, calling out its features and price point.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media commerce video with high text density and energetic pacing, focusing on visual appeal and price-value proposition.
